summary: Removed the legacy .crew/agent-shortcuts/narada-architect.cmd wrapper and updated current crew docs to use the repo-root PowerShell surface instead. Verified .\narada.ps1 agent-start dry-run, verified shortcut readback, and confirmed the .cmd file and README reference are gone.
residuals: Historical audit files still mention the retired .cmd wrapper as past evidence; current docs and ledger supersede it.
